option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.21)
project(XPadLink VERSION 0.2.0 LANGUAGES CXX)
option(XPAD_USE_ABLETON_LINK "Build with Ableton Link SDK support" OFF) set(ABLETON_LINK_DIR "" CACHE PATH "Path to Ableton Link SDK root")
if(ABLETON_LINK_DIR STREQUAL "" AND EXISTS "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/ableton-link/include/ableton/Link.hpp") set(ABLETON_LINK_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/ableton-link" CACHE PATH "" FORCE) endif()
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20) set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON) set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
include(CTest) find_package(Threads REQUIRED) find_package(PkgConfig REQUIRED)
pkg_check_modules(RTMIDI REQUIRED rtmidi) pkg_check_modules(RUBBERBAND REQUIRED rubberband) pkg_check_modules(GLFW3 REQUIRED glfw3) find_package(OpenGL REQUIRED)
# --- Third-party paths ------------------------------------------------------- set(IMGUI_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/third_party/imgui") set(MINIAUDIO_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/third_party")
# --- ImGui library ----------------------------------------------------------- add_library(imgui STATIC ${IMGUI_DIR}/imgui.cpp ${IMGUI_DIR}/imgui_draw.cpp ${IMGUI_DIR}/imgui_tables.cpp ${IMGUI_DIR}/imgui_widgets.cpp ${IMGUI_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp ${IMGUI_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp ) target_include_directories(imgui PUBLIC ${IMGUI_DIR} ${IMGUI_DIR}/backends ) target_link_libraries(imgui PUBLIC ${GLFW3_LIBRARIES} OpenGL::GL) target_compile_options(imgui PRIVATE -w) # suppress imgui warnings
# --- Core library ------------------------------------------------------------ add_library(xpad_core STATIC src/app/App.cpp src/audio/AudioEngine.cpp src/audio/AudioScheduler.cpp src/audio/TimeStretch.cpp src/config/Config.cpp src/gui/MainWindow.cpp src/link/LinkManager.cpp src/midi/MidiManager.cpp src/samples/SampleLoader.cpp )
target_include_directories(xpad_core PUBLIC ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src ${MINIAUDIO_DIR} ${RTMIDI_INCLUDE_DIRS} ${RUBBERBAND_INCLUDE_DIRS} ${GLFW3_INCLUDE_DIRS} )
target_link_libraries(xpad_core PUBLIC Threads::Threads imgui ${RTMIDI_LIBRARIES} ${RUBBERBAND_LIBRARIES} ${GLFW3_LIBRARIES} OpenGL::GL dl m )
if(UNIX AND NOT APPLE) target_link_libraries(xpad_core PUBLIC asound) endif()
target_compile_features(xpad_core PUBLIC cxx_std_20) target_compile_definitions(xpad_core PUBLIC $<$<BOOL:${XPAD_USE_ABLETON_LINK}>:XPAD_HAS_ABLETON_LINK=1> )
if(MSVC) target_compile_options(xpad_core PRIVATE /W4 /permissive-) else() target_compile_options(xpad_core PRIVATE -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic) endif()
# --- Ableton Link integration ------------------------------------------------ if(XPAD_USE_ABLETON_LINK) if(NOT EXISTS "${ABLETON_LINK_DIR}/include/ableton/Link.hpp") message(FATAL_ERROR "XPAD_USE_ABLETON_LINK=ON requires ABLETON_LINK_DIR pointing to the Ableton Link SDK root") endif() if(NOT EXISTS "${ABLETON_LINK_DIR}/modules/asio-standalone/asio/include/asio.hpp") message(FATAL_ERROR "Ableton Link SDK is missing the asio-standalone submodule.\nRun: git -C ${ABLETON_LINK_DIR} submodule update --init --recursive") endif()
include("${ABLETON_LINK_DIR}/cmake_include/ConfigureAbletonLink.cmake") ConfigureAbletonLink("${ABLETON_LINK_DIR}") target_link_libraries(xpad_core PUBLIC Ableton::Link) endif()
# --- Executables ------------------------------------------------------------- add_executable(xpad_link src/main.cpp) target_link_libraries(xpad_link PRIVATE xpad_core)
add_executable(xpad_link_tests tests/LinkManagerTests.cpp) target_link_libraries(xpad_link_tests PRIVATE xpad_core)
add_test(NAME xpad_link_tests COMMAND xpad_link_tests)

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
# XPad Link
Bootstrap inicial da **Fase 1** do projeto descrito em `INSTRUCTIONS.md`.
## O que já existe
- Base de build com **CMake** e **C++20** - Executável de console `xpad_link` - Integração funcional com o **SDK real do Ableton Link** presente em `ableton-link/` - `LinkManager` com dois modos: - **Simulation**: roda sem dependências externas para validar BPM/beat agora - **Ableton Link**: ponto de integração opcional para o SDK oficial - Snapshot em tempo real com: - status de conexão - peer count - BPM - beat atual - Testes simples cobrindo: - avanço do beat - continuidade ao mudar o BPM - projeção de beat futuro
## Estrutura atual
```text src/ app/ core/ link/ tests/ ```
## Build local
### Linux / macOS
```bash cmake --preset default cmake --build --preset default ctest --preset default ```
## Preparar o SDK local do Ableton Link
O repositório já inclui o código-fonte do SDK em `ableton-link/`, mas é preciso inicializar o submódulo `asio-standalone` após clonar:
```bash git -C ableton-link submodule update --init --recursive ```
## Build com Ableton Link real
```bash cmake --preset ableton-link cmake --build --preset ableton-link ./build/xpad_link --duration-seconds 5 --print-ms 250 ```
### Executar
```bash ./build/xpad_link --duration-seconds 5 --print-ms 250 --simulate-tempo-change --simulation-only ```
> Observação: se quiser apontar para outra cópia do SDK, sobrescreva `ABLETON_LINK_DIR` no configure.
## Próximos passos sugeridos
1. Validar a API exata do SDK do Ableton Link no ambiente alvo. 2. Trocar o modo de simulação pela captura real de sessão Link. 3. Introduzir `AudioScheduler` e testes de quantização antes da engine de áudio completa. 4. Adicionar MIDI (`RtMidi`) e engine de áudio (`miniaudio`).
